stories.title: Stuttgart QF Friday — Mpetshi Perricard, Bublik, Lehecka, Tiafoe Compete for Semi Spots

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: Stuttgart QF: Mpetshi Perricard — 49 aces this tournament — meets Bublik in their first ever grass meeting. H2H is 2-1 GMP, but grass changes the math. Ace machine vs showman. #Stuttgart #TennisFanrecap

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: QF day in Stuttgart: Lehecka vs Tiafoe, Mpetshi Perricard vs Bublik. Shelton (No. 1 seed) and Fritz (defending champion) watching Saturday's semis take shape. Who punches through? #Stuttgart #TennisFanrecap

article.headline: Stuttgart QF Friday: Mpetshi Perricard's Ace Machine Meets Bublik's Showmanship

stories.title: Queen's Club Day 5 — Rybakina, Raducanu, Boulter Star in Massive Rain Catch-Up Day

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text: Queen's Club fitting 5 R16 matches into one day after Thursday's washout. Rybakina (No. 1 seed), Raducanu vs Cirstea, and Boulter all on court Friday. Wimbledon is 17 days away. #QueensClub #TennisFanrecap

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text: Boulter blasting through. Raducanu faces Cirstea in a Transylvania Open final rematch. Rybakina the No. 1 seed and favourite on the other side. British tennis Friday at Queen's Club. #QueensClub #TennisFanrecap

article.headline: Queen's Club Day 5: Five Matches, One Friday, Wimbledon 17 Days Away

stories.title: Sinner Confirms Hurlingham — Giorgio Armani Tennis Classic June 23-27

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text: Sinner will skip all ATP grass events but play the Giorgio Armani Tennis Classic at Hurlingham June 23-27. Cobolli and Darderi also in the lineup. Wimbledon draw is June 26 — right in the middle of it. #Sinner #TennisFanrecap

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text: World No. 1 Sinner's Wimbledon prep: no Halle, no Queen's Club, no ranked events. Just Hurlingham June 23-27 with Cobolli, Darderi and Norrie — then the Championships June 29. #Wimbledon #TennisFanrecap

article.headline: Sinner Skips All Tour Grass Events But Picks Hurlingham as His Wimbledon Bridge

stories.title: FAA Reaches Libema Open QF — Faces Majchrzak on Friday

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text: Auger-Aliassime into the Libema Open QF: beat Fucsovics 6-3, 6-4 without facing a single break point. Record vs Fucsovics now 5-2. The world No. 4 ranking is looking very accurate this week. #LibemaOpen #TennisFanrecap

article.headline: Auger-Aliassime Into Libema Open QF After Clinical Win Over Fucsovics

stories.title: Wimbledon 17 Days Out — Sinner Defends as Alcaraz Withdraws

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: Wimbledon opens in 17 days. Alcaraz is out (wrist injury). Sinner defends his 2025 title. Swiatek defends the women's crown. The draw is June 26. Grass season is building toward something. #Wimbledon #TennisFanrecap

article.headline: Wimbledon 2026: 17 Days Out, Alcaraz Withdraws, Sinner Stands Alone
